languages.text: [Демонстративно зевнуть] "Дождаться пока ты прекратишь изводить меня вопросами?"
[Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"

languages.text: [あくびを大きくする]「君が質問しなくなるのを待つ？」
languages.original_text: [Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"

languages.text: 【毫不掩饰地打个哈欠】“等你把问题都问完？”
languages.original_text: [Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"

languages.text: [Bostezar sin disimulo] «¿Esperar a que deje de hacerme preguntas?».
languages.original_text: [Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"

traits.locale_text: [Bostezar sin disimulo] «¿Esperar a que deje de hacerme preguntas?».

languages.text: [Gähnen] "Dass Ihr aufhört, mir Fragen zu stellen?"
languages.original_text: [Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"

languages.text: [Bâiller ostensiblement] « Attendre que vous cessiez de me poser des questions ? »
languages.original_text: [Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"

traits.locale_text: [Bâiller ostensiblement] « Attendre que vous cessiez de me poser des questions ? »

languages.text: [Açıkça esne] "Bana soru sormayı bırakmanı beklemek için mi?"
